intent: a portfolio site for an independent furniture maker working in solid walnut, based in Seoul

turn_log.delta: Switch display family from Dela Gothic One to Source Serif 4 (optical sizing axis) — the current choice is a Japanese manga slab with no Hangul support, wrong for a bilingual Seoul studio; Source Serif 4 handles Korean/Latin gracefully and delivers the editorial authority the prose claims.
